h1: 23.2 Cu.Ft, Side By Side Refrigerator, PCM Color, Smart Diagnosis, Smart Inverter Compressor

gallery.a: Front view of LG 658L Side by Side Refrigerator in Dark Graphite Steel (LS25CBBDIK)
Front open view with groceries stored inside

modules.head: Seals in Farm Freshness Longer
modules.body: LinearCooling™ reduces temperature fluctuations, locking in the flavor of fresh for up to 7 days.

imgs.a: Close-up video of water dripping from crisp green lettuce, tomato, and blueberries — LinearCooling™ keeps produce fresh

modules.head: Optimal Temperatures Everywhere
modules.body: Air flows in every direction to keep your food fresh, no matter where you place it.

imgs.a: Refrigerator interior with Multi Air Flow — optimal temperatures everywhere

modules.head: Store More with More Interior Space
modules.body: Enjoy plenty of room to store all your food and beverages that doesn't crowd your kitchen.

imgs.a: Open refrigerator with neon arrows highlighting the larger interior space

modules.head: Enhance Your Décor with an UltraSleek Door
modules.body: The UltraSleek Door instantly enhances the décor of any kitchen.

imgs.a: Side view of a modern kitchen with a black refrigerator installed

modules.head: Connect and Control from Anywhere
modules.body: Monitor and control your refrigerator remotely with the LG ThinQ™ app on your smartphone.

imgs.a: LG ThinQ app — remote control and monitoring for your refrigerator

modules.head: Never Worry About Open Doors
modules.body: Forgot to close the fridge door? The LG ThinQ™ app sends an instant alert to your phone so your food stays fresh.

imgs.a: LG ThinQ Smart Alert — phone notification when fridge door is left open

modules.head: Energy Efficient & Durable
modules.body: LG Smart Inverter Compressor™ takes energy efficiency to the next level to help you save more — and 10 years of peace of mind.

imgs.a: 10-Year Warranty badge with Smart Inverter Compressor logo

modules.head: SASO-Certified
modules.body: Certified by SASO (Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization) for energy performance in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
